BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: JAYNE LARKIN WRIGHTSMAN IRR TRUST XXXXX7008

IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: TO PROVIDE SUPPORT TO THE METROPOLITAN MUSEUM OF ART.
IRS990.MissionDesc: TO PROVIDE SUPPORT TO THE METROPOLITAN MUSEUM OF ART.
IRS990.Desc: TO PROVIDE SUPPORT TO THE METROPOLITAN MUSEUM OF ART.

Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.ExplanationTxt: TRUST PROVIDES SUPPORT TO METROPOLITAN MUSEUM OF ART AS DESCRIBED IN THE GOVERNING DOCUMENTS. THE TRUST REPORTS WITH THE MUSEUM REGARDING USE OF FUNDS AND CONTINUES TO HAVE A CLOSE AND CONTINUOUS RELATIONSHIP WITH THE MUSEUM VIA COMMUNICATION REGARDING GRANTS PROVIDE, AND HOW THE MUSEUM WILL USE THE FUNDS.

REGULAR CORRESPONDENCE IS SENT TO THE SUPPORTED ORGANIZATION REGARDING THE RESTRICTED USE OF THE CHARITABLE DISTRIBUTIONS, TRUSTEE FEE PRICING CHANGES, NOTIFICATION OF NEW PROPRIETARY MUTUAL FUN OFFERINGS, AND PROVIDING GOVERNING DOCUMENTS AND SUPPLEMENTAL TRUST INFORMATION.
THE SUPPORTED ORGANIZATION IS TAX EXEMPT UNDER SECTION 170(b)(1)(A)(i) AS A MUSEUM AND THEREFORE IS NOT REQUIRED TO OBTAIN A DETERMINATION LETTER.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: EXPLANATION FOR FORM 990, SCHEDULE I, PART 1, LINE 2
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: TRUST ACCOUNTING RECORDS ARE MAINTAINED IN A DEDICATED TRUSTACCOUNTING SYSTEM. REPORTS ARE REGULARLY OBTAINED FROM THIS SYSTEM.TRUST ADMINISTRATORS FOLLOW THE RULES AND REGULATIONS GOVERNING CONTINUITY AND MAINTENANCE OF EXEMPT STATUS WHILE ALSO CARRYING OUTINDIVIDUAL TRUST OR INTENT. DUTIES INCLUDED ANNUAL TRUST REVIEW,ISSUING REPORTS, IDENTIFYING CHARITABLE RECIPIENTS, RESEARCHING TAX STATUS OF POTENTIAL CHARITABLE RECIPIENTS, AND MAKING NECESSARY INCOME DISTRIBUTIONS FROM EACH TRUST.
JPMORGAN CHASE BANK NA IN ITS CAPACITY AS THE TRUSTEE AND THE INVESTMENT MANAGER OVERSEES ALL TRANSACTION AND MAKES SURE THAT NO CONFLICT OF INTEREST ARISES THROUGH THE POLICY.

THE ORGANIZATION DOES NOT HAVE A TOP MANAGEMENT OFFICIAL. THIS AUTHORITY RESTS WITH THE SUPPORTED ORGANIZATION, THE METROPOLITAN MUSEUM OF ART. THE SUPPORTED ORGANIZATION APPROVES ALL COMPENSATION PAID TO THE TRUSTEE.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PAGE 6, PART VI, LINE 11-DESCRIPTION OF PROCESS FOR REVIEW
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: TRUSTEE REVIEWS ALL UNDERLYING MONETARY AND FACTUAL INFORMATION BEFORE THE IRS FORM 990 IS FILED.

AS TRUSTEE, JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NA. MAINTAINS A CLOSE AND CONTINUOUS WORKING RELATIONSHIP WITH THE OFFICERS OF THE SUPPORTED ORGANIZATION.THE GOVERNING DOCUMENTS ARE NOT AVAILABLE TO THE GENERAL PUBLIC, BUT HAVE BEEN GIVEN AND ARE AVAILABLE TO ALL INTERESTED PARTIES SUCH AS BENEFICIARIES, TRUSTEES, EXECUTORS, ETC. JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NA, DOES NOT HAVE A PUBLIC CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY. HOWEVER, THE GOVERNING DOCUMENTS AND STATE LAW IMPOSE LIMITATIONS OF TRUSTEE POWERS THAT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NA, STRICTLY FOLLOWS. FINANCIAL STATEMENTS ARE SENT TO EACH CHARTIABLE BENEFIARY FOR REVIEW AND COMMENT.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: EXPLANATION FOR FORM 990, PART XI, LINE 9
